title: diostea scoparia
intro: Diostea scoparia, also known as Mexican feathergrass or Mexican feather grass, is a perennial grass native to Mexico and parts of the southwestern United States. Diostea scoparia has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its ability to treat digestive issues, coughs, and colds. The plant is also known to have health benefits such as reducing inflammation, improving respiratory function, and possessing antioxidant properties. Diostea scoparia can be prepared as herbal teas, tinctures, or infusions, and is often used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments.
